items.name: Classic Smash Burger
items.description: Double smashed beef patty, American cheese, pickles, mustard, ketchup on a brioche bun

items.name: Spicy Crispy Chicken Burger
items.description: Buttermilk fried chicken, sriracha slaw, jalapeños, and chipotle mayo on a toasted bun

items.name: BBQ Bacon Burger
items.description: Beef patty, smoky BBQ sauce, crispy bacon, caramelised onions, and cheddar cheese

items.name: Mushroom Swiss Burger
items.description: Beef patty topped with sautéed mushrooms, Swiss cheese, and garlic aioli

items.name: Loaded Fries
items.description: Crispy fries topped with cheddar sauce, bacon bits, and spring onions

items.name: Onion Rings
items.description: Beer-battered onion rings served with a smoky dipping sauce

items.name: Coleslaw
items.description: House-made creamy coleslaw with a hint of apple cider vinegar

items.name: Sweet Potato Fries
items.description: Crispy sweet potato fries seasoned with sea salt and smoked paprika

items.name: Classic Lemonade
items.description: Freshly squeezed lemonade with a hint of mint, served over ice

items.name: Chocolate Milkshake
items.description: Thick and creamy chocolate milkshake made with real ice cream

items.name: Craft Cola
items.description: Small-batch handcrafted cola with natural vanilla and citrus notes

items.name: Mango Iced Tea
items.description: Cold-brewed black tea blended with real mango puree, lightly sweetened
